runTitle: AI Assistant cleanup local dev supervisor report smoke

environment.backend: Cloud Run disabled; local fallback JSON

coveredSurfaces: report keyword query does not return 202 job-queue redirect

expertAssessments.rationale: Local runtime smoke verified the previously failing report-keyword fallback path without spending live LLM/Cloud Run quota.
The smoke used Cloud Run disabled mode and confirmed the legacy route returns HTTP 200 JSON fallback with no job-queue redirect.

usageChecks.summary: Local dev curl smoke only; no Vercel production function/build usage was generated.

notes: Request: POST /api/ai/supervisor, Accept: application/json, query: 현재 위험 서버 근본 원인 보고서를 만들어줘.
Observed: HTTP 200, x-ai-route-contract=legacy-supervisor, x-ai-transport=json, no redirect field, fallback backend.
